description: CellScript script using LOAD_SCRIPT_HASH syscall pass case - calls ckb::current_script_hash() and returns 0

cellscript_metadata.note: Uses ckb::current_script_hash() which invokes LOAD_SCRIPT_HASH syscall. This is a real CKB VM syscall, not a compile-time constant. Proves the CKB VM harness works with actual syscall context.
